rationale: The score is identical (5/10) across both evaluations, and both reach the same core conclusion: broad engineering experience but lacking recent, deep JVM/Spring/IDE-internals work, with recent focus on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. The wording differs (different examples cited, slightly reorganized phrasing) but the substance, concerns, and verdict are unchanged. None of the differences key off the Berlin→San Francisco location change; they are ordinary run-to-run rewording noise.
